name: meetings_list
description: List all scheduled and live meetings for a specified user. Returns meeting IDs, topics, start times, durations, and statuses with pagination support.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: The user ID or email address. Use 'me' for the authenticated user.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Meeting type filter: scheduled, live, upcoming, upcoming_meetings, previous_meetings.

parameters.name: next_page_token
parameters.description: Pagination token for fetching the next page of results.

parameters.name: page_number
parameters.description: Page number of results (deprecated, use next_page_token).
